case_title: BIGANEH MADJLESSI VS. ELISE YVONNE ROUSSEAU

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-25-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROUSSEAU, ELISE YVONNE
DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT, UNABLE TO APPEAR AT 7/3/18 HEARING; BUT PROVIDES COPY OF AGREEMENT THAT SETTLEMENT HAS BEEN COMPLETED FILED BY DEFENDANT ROUSSEAU, ELISE YVONNE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY MADJLESSI, BIGANEH ROUSSEAU, ELISE YVONNE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MADJLESSI, BIGANEH AS TO DEFENDANT ROUSSEAU, ELISE YVONNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-03-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF BIGANEH MADJLESSI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ELISE ROUSSEAU IS PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE ORDERED DEFENDANT TO RETURN HISTORIC ARMCHAIR TO PLAINTIFF BY NO LATER THAN JUNE 15, 2018. PROGRESS REPORT APPEARANCE NECESSARY ONLY IF ONE PARTY OR THE OTHER DISPUTES THE RETURN OF THE ARMCHAIR, IF NO APPEARANCES MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF BIGANEH MADJLESSI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF INDICATED THE TERMS OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT HAVE BEEN HONORED AND EXECUTED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MADJLESSI, BIGANEH AS TO DEFENDANT ROUSSEAU, ELISE YVONNE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED APR-24-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROUSSEAU, ELISE YVONNE
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
